  • Overview
  • Tree

  • Help

    All Classes and Interfaces

    Class
    Description
    AnimatedSprite
    Represents an animated sprite.
    BackdoorRoom
    Backdoor room UI
    BackgroundMusicTrack
    Represents a background music track.
    BackgroundMusicTrack.TrackMode
    Represents track modes.
    Bacon
    Represents a bacon ingredient.
    BaconSalad
    Represents the bacon salad menu item.
    Bakable
    Interface for bakable ingredient which can be interacted with using Oven.
    BaseContainer
    This class is the base class of any container entity.
    BaseCounter
    Abstract base class for all counters.
    BaseIngredient
    This class is the base class of any ingredient entity.
    BaseItem
    This class is the base class of any item entity which are Containers and Ingredients.
    BaseMenu
    This class is a base class of food menu
    BedRoom
    Bedroom UI
    BGMManager
    Manages background music.
    BGMManager.TrackName
    Represents background music track names.
    Boilable
    Interface for boilable ingredient which can be interacted with using Pot
    Bowl
    Represents a bowl container.
    BreadLoaf
    Represents the bread loaf menu item.
    BreakfastSet
    Represents the breakfast set menu item.
    Choppable
    Interface for choppable ingredient which can be interacted with using Chopping Board
    ChoppingBoardCounter
    Counter for chopping ingredients.
    ColdZoneRoom
    Cold zone room UI
    Cone
    Represents an ice cream cone ingredient.
    Counter
    Generic counter for placing items.
    DeepFryer
    Counter for deep frying ingredients.
    DetailedMenu
    Interface for detailed menus.
    DialogManager
    Manages dialogs in the game.
    Dough
    Represents a dough ingredient.
    Egg
    Represents an egg ingredient.
    FoodOrder
    Customer's food order object
    FrenchFries
    Represents the french fries menu item.
    Fryable
    Interface for fryable ingredient which can be interacted with using Deep fryer
    GameInstance
    Control most of the game's main logic.
    GameScene
    The main game's UI.
    Grillable
    Interface for grillable ingredient which can be interacted with using Stove
    HotZoneRoom
    Hot zone room UI
    IceCreamable
    Interface for ingredient that can be used as an ice cream holder which can be interacted with using Ice Cream Machine.
    IceCreamCone
    Represents the ice cream cone menu item.
    IceCreamFlavor
    Enum class for all possible ice cream flavor including no flavor.
    IceCreamMachine
    Counter for making ice cream.
    IceCreamSandwich
    Represents the ice cream sandwich menu item.
    IceCreamSet
    Represents the ice cream set menu item.
    ItemSprite
    Represents an item sprite.
    ItemSpriteType
    Represents the types of item sprites.
    Lettuce
    Represents lettuce ingredient.
    Main
    The main entry point for the application.
    MainMenu
    Represents the main menu UI.
    MashedPotato
    Represents a mashed potato ingredient.
    MenuType
    Represents the types of menus available.
    Milk
    Represents milk ingredient.
    Mixable
    Interface for ingredient that can be interacted with using Mixer
    Mixer
    Counter for mixing ingredients.
    Oven
    Counter for baking ingredients.
    Plate
    Represents a plate container.
    Pot
    Counter for boiling ingredients.
    Potato
    Represents a potato ingredient.
    RequireContainer
    Interface for menus that require a container.
    Room
    Base class of all room UI
    RunAfterChange
    Interface for Scene that need some part of a code to be run immediately after changed the scene.
    The method runAfter() will be called by SceneManager.
    Sandwich
    Represents the sandwich menu item.
    SatisfactoryMeal
    Represents the satisfactory meal menu item.
    ServeCounter
    Counter for serving food orders.
    ServingRoom
    Serving room UI
    SettingsMenu
    Represents the settings menu UI.
    SFXManager
    Manages sound effects in the game.
    SlicedBread
    Represents sliced bread ingredient.
    SoundEffect
    Wrapper class for AudioClip to conveniently control its volume.
    Spaghetti
    Represents the spaghetti menu item.
    StageManager
    Manages stage transitions.
    StoveCounter
    Counter for grilling ingredients.
    SummaryMenu
    Represents the summary menu UI.
    ThreadManager
    Manages thread execution.
    Tomato
    Represents a tomato ingredient.
    TomatoSauce
    Represents tomato sauce ingredient.
    Tray
    Represents a tray container.
    TutorialScene
    Represents the tutorial scene UI.
    Updatable
    Interface for updatable logic entities.
    WalkDirection
    Represents the player walk directions.
    Waterable
    Interface for ingredient which can be added water to using Water Dispenser.
    WaterDispenser
    Counter for dispensing water.
    WheatFlour
    Represents wheat flour ingredient.
